title: Unique Substrings in Wraparound String
titleCn: 环绕字符串中唯一的子字符串

testcases.input: s = "a" Output: 1 Explanation: Only the substring "a" of s is in base.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: Only the substring "a" of s is in base.

testcases.input: s = "cac" Output: 2 Explanation: There are two substrings ("a", "c") of s in base.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: There are two substrings ("a", "c") of s in base.

testcases.input: s = "zab" Output: 6 Explanation: There are six substrings ("z", "a", "b", "za", "ab", and "zab") of s in base.
testcases.expectedOutput: 6 Explanation: There are six substrings ("z", "a", "b", "za", "ab", and "zab") of s in base.
